quests.title: Choose Your Captain
quests.objective: Select Luffy or Zoro on the character select screen.

quests.title: Inspect the Treasure
quests.objective: Inspect all owned One Piece card pedestals in the Card Vault.

quests.title: Clean the Bid Book
quests.objective: Review all 13 open Courtyard offers and mark keep/cancel decisions.

quests.title: Read the Poneglyphs
quests.objective: Open Robin's source ledger and view OP14/EB04 plus August 2026 anniversary notes.

quests.title: Chopper's Checkup
quests.objective: Review the low-grade, duplicate, and CGC/PSA liquidity warnings.

quests.title: New Crew Member
quests.objective: Add a test card manually and export the local JSON.

quests.title: Soul King Encore
quests.objective: Open the dossier archive and play the private soundtrack.
